title: Network anatomy and in vivo physiology of visual cortical neurons
abstract: In the cerebral cortex, weights of connections between neurons determine how activity patterns are produced. Using large-scale serial-section electron microscopy and functional two-photon calcium imaging, we study the network anatomy of inhibitory interneurons in mouse primary visual cortex, revealing the first combined functional-structural dataset in mammalian cortex.
notes: Already in existing 102. First combined 2-photon + volume EM in mammalian brain. Laid groundwork for MICrONS.
